title: Cracked Tier Tagger
description: Display player's PvP Tiers in their nametag! (Cracked Tiers)
body:
# Cracked Tiers
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fda8990ed4432d773c708f5e03cb58e7932d3c3.png)

> Visit us today at https://crackedtiers.xyz

Cracked Tier Tagger is a mod that displays a player's PvP Tier in their nametag. TierTagger supports 2 Cracked Tiers game modes. If a player is unranked in a specified game mode, Cracked Tier Tagger will display their highest Tier overall.

![NameTag View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb9ef9154bc4a77b549b05dd80c5a4670557af3b.png)

Cracked Tier Tagger also has a built-in system to view a player's statistics by /tiertagger <Player>! We also have built-in configuration for you to select your preferred gamemode!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/784f6a5e744da21e4a4de2109f458fdade85b3a5_0.webp)
